prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan VR30DDTT (3.0L twin-turbo V6, 400hp stock) with a custom wiring harness by HKS to retain the Galue's electrical architecture, paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (82mm compressor, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) for a target of 550whp on E85 fuel

Full bolt-on supporting mods for the VR30DDTT: Tomei 80mm titanium exhaust manifold, custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Fujitsubo Legalis R with dual 100mm outlets, and a GReddy Profec B Spec II standalone ECU with custom VR30DDTT-specific maps developed by Top Secret Japan

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valving for the Galue's 1,600kg weight), Eibach Pro-Kit springs (20mm drop), and Cusco front strut tower bar (2-point, 30mm diameter) to reduce chassis flex under high-torque loads
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Galue-specific widebody kit (Type 2, with extended fenders, custom side skirts, and a ducktail spoiler) in raw carbon fiber, paired with Work Meister S1 3P 19x9.5 +30 front and 19x11 +40 rear wheels (matte bronze finish) wrapped in Toyo R888R 265/35/19 and 295/30/19 tires

Custom front bumper lip by Liberty Walk (Galue-specific design) with integrated LED fog lights from PIAA (520 Series, 30W), and a rear diffuser by Varis (carbon fiber, 3-piece design with integrated exhaust cutouts for the Fujitsubo system)

Interior retrim with Recaro SR-7F seats (custom embroidered Mitsuoka logo in red), Nardi Classic steering wheel (380mm, perforated leather), and a full Alcantara headliner with red stitching by Auto Trim Design in Tokyo
